findings.detail: Only standard library imports (__future__, dataclasses, datetime). No imports from pipeline/ siblings, no imports from shadows/, no imports from gateway/.

Single public entry: async run_pre_trade_checklist(decision_ticket: dict, market_data: dict) -> PreTradeReport. Input/output clearly defined via dict keys documented in docstring. Async but no I/O inside — ready for future async extensions.
Called by gate3_interaction.py:360-379 with properly constructed decision_ticket dict and market_data dict. Tickete fields match documented contract.

6 checks cover: data freshness, stop tightness, stop looseness, stop placement quality, position limit compliance, conflicting positions, and kill criteria monitoring. BLOCK/WARN/INFO severity correctly assigned. Aggregate all_blockers_passed computed correctly from BLOCK items only.
